queries.question: What are the street addresses and cities of the rental properties in the database?
queries.sql: SELECT P.Street_Address, City from Transactions AS T LEFT JOIN Properties AS P ON T.property_id = P.property_id WHERE T.TypeOfTransaction LIKE 'Rent'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?street_address ?city WHERE {
  ?t a :Transactions .
  ?p a :Properties .
  ?t p:hasProperties ?p .
  ?p p:Street_Address ?street_address .
  ?p p:City ?city .
  ?t p:TypeOfTransaction ?typeoftransaction_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?typeoftransaction_lk), "^Rent$"))
}

queries.question: In what city is the property of the customer with phone number 555-333-4444 located?
queries.sql: SELECT P.City from ClientProperties LEFT JOIN Clients as C ON ClientProperties.client_id = C.client_id LEFT JOIN Properties AS P ON ClientProperties.property_id = P.property_id WHERE C.PhoneNumber LIKE '555-333-4444'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city WHERE {
  ?clientproperties a :ClientProperties .
  ?c a :Clients .
  ?clientproperties p:hasClients ?c .
  ?p a :Properties .
  ?clientproperties p:hasProperties ?p .
  ?p p:City ?city .
  ?c p:PhoneNumber ?phonenumber_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?phonenumber_lk), "^555\\-333\\-4444$"))
}
